face_identity_match.failure_action: rerun face/reference pass or lower conflicting LoRA weight

body_silhouette_match.failure_action: rerun base/control pass; do not over-inpaint wrong silhouette

hair_match.failure_action: masked hair detail pass or revise hair variant

skin_marker_preservation.failure_action: masked skin detail pass or marker recovery

voice_identity_match.failure_action: rerun voice profile or audio model route

multi_character_separation.failure_action: split per-character masks and rerun detail passes

no_identity_bleed.failure_action: block promotion and rerun with regional model selection
